description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage. Add a job called node:build that runs in the build stage, extends the .base_node and .node-cache-push templates, and therefore uses the Docker image defined in .base_node (a Node.js image). The job executes the exact shell command 'yarn install' and inherits any caching behavior defined in .node-cache-push. No explicit artifacts, rules, or deployment targets are defined.
